title: GitHub - inklate/social-skills: Social media skills for your AI agents
excerpt: Social media skills for your AI agents. Contribute to inklate/social-skills development by creating an account on GitHub.
content_html:
A collection of AI agent skills that learn your strategy, voice, and platform-native format — posts, threads, carousels, reels-ready scripts, ad copy, calendars.

Your agent can already write. It can't write a LinkedIn post that sounds like you, sized for the feed, with a hook that stops the scroll. These skills teach it strategy, voice, and platform-native format — posts, threads, carousels, reels-ready scripts, ad copy, calendars — a full content system, not one-off prompts. No accounts, no APIs, works in every agent.

Quick start

npx skills add inklate/social-skills

Tip: when an agent runs this non-interactively it may install only to .agents/skills/, which Claude Code doesn't read — pass -a claude-code. Install a single skill with --skill cross-post.

Or as an auto-updating Claude Code plugin:

/plugin marketplace add inklate/social-skills
/plugin install social-skills@inklate

Then say "set up my social context" to begin — the social-context skill interviews you once and writes social-context.md, the file every other skill reads for your audience, platforms, pillars, and voice.

Skills

Skill Category What it does
social-context Foundation Interview the user in ten questions or fewer and produce a social-context.md file that captures who they are, who they are talking to, what they post about, and what they refuse to post.
voice Foundation Analyze 3–10 writing samples the user provides — LinkedIn posts, X (Twitter) threads, emails, blog posts — and distill how they actually write: sentence length, rhythm, vocabulary, punctuation and emoji habits, openers, sign-offs, and humor register.
carousel Create Turn a post, article, or idea into a complete slide-by-slide carousel script for Instagram or LinkedIn, with a hook cover, one-idea-per-slide content slides, a recap, and a CTA slide.
cross-post Create Turn one story, blog post, announcement, or idea into native-feeling drafts for multiple platforms at once — LinkedIn, X (Twitter), Instagram, Facebook, Threads, Bluesky, and Mastodon — adapting tone, length, structure, hashtags, and format per platform instead of copy-pasting one caption everywhere.
hooks Create Generate eight scored hook options for any social post draft or topic, spanning proven patterns from curiosity gaps and bold claims to contrarian takes and story cold-opens.
linkedin-post Create Draft a LinkedIn post built for how the LinkedIn feed actually works: a hook that earns the "…see more" click in the first 200 characters, white-space rhythm, one idea per post, a specific call to action, and no hashtag soup.
reply-writer Create Triage a pasted batch of comments, mentions, and DMs from LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Facebook, or Threads, and draft on-voice replies where they're warranted.
repurpose Create Mine one long-form source — a blog post, video transcript, podcast episode, or talk — for its strongest atomic ideas and turn it into a full week of platform-shaped drafts for LinkedIn, X (Twitter), and Instagram, plus a short-video script.
x-thread Create Build an X (Twitter) thread with real architecture instead of a chopped-up blog post: a hook tweet that earns the click-through, one idea per tweet, an escalation-and-payoff structure, and a closing CTA tweet — every tweet char-budgeted to 280 with the count shown.
ad-writer Ads Write paid social ad copy variant sets for Meta (Facebook and Instagram), LinkedIn, X, and TikTok placements.
content-calendar Plan Turn content pillars, target platforms, and an honest posting cadence into a realistic 2-week content plan for LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Threads, Bluesky, and Facebook.
post-check Check Validate a social post draft against the target platform's real constraints and conventions before it goes out, covering LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, Bluesky, and Mastodon.
social-audit Check Audit a social profile or content history the user pastes or points at — LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, or Bluesky — against their stated goals.

How the skills fit together

            ┌────────────────┐   ┌───────┐
            │ social-context │ + │ voice │        Foundation — run these first;
            └───────┬────────┘   └───┬───┘        they write social-context.md
                    └───────┬────────┘
        ┌───────────────────┼────────────────────┐
        ▼                   ▼                    ▼
      CREATE               PLAN                CHECK
  linkedin-post      content-calendar        post-check
  x-thread                                   social-audit
  hooks                    ADS
  carousel               ad-writer
  cross-post
  repurpose
  reply-writer

Just say it

Skills trigger on natural phrases — no commands to memorize:

  • "turn this blog post into posts for LinkedIn and X" → cross-post
  • "write a LinkedIn post about our launch" → linkedin-post
  • "give me better hooks for this draft" → hooks
  • "plan my next two weeks of content" → content-calendar
  • "will this work on Instagram?" → post-check
  • "write Facebook ad variants for this offer" → ad-writer
  • "help me reply to these comments" → reply-writer
  • "learn my voice from these posts" → voice

Install for your agent

These are standard Agent Skills — one folder per skill, each a SKILL.md — so any agent that reads the format can use them. The skills CLI installs them into whichever agent you use (40+ supported); pass -a <agent> to target one explicitly, or omit it to auto-detect the agents you have installed.

Agent Install Skills docs
Claude Code npx skills add inklate/social-skills -a claude-code — or the plugin docs
Codex CLI npx skills add inklate/social-skills -a codex docs
Cursor npx skills add inklate/social-skills -a cursor docs
OpenCode npx skills add inklate/social-skills -a opencode docs
Gemini CLI npx skills add inklate/social-skills -a gemini docs
GitHub Copilot npx skills add inklate/social-skills -a copilot docs

The full agent list lives at skills.sh.

Manual install

  • Copy into place: git clone https://github.com/inklate/social-skills && cp -r social-skills/skills/* ~/.claude/skills/ (swap the target for your agent's skills directory).
  • Submodule: git submodule add https://github.com/inklate/social-skills .agents/social-skills
  • Zips: per-skill zips on GitHub Releases for Claude Desktop / Cowork upload.
  • Fork it. These skills are meant to be customized — fork the repo and edit the voice rules, platform defaults, and quality bars to match your brand.

Ship it

These skills produce drafts and plans. Coming next: a companion skill pack that lets your agent actually publish, schedule, and measure across LinkedIn, X, Instagram, and Facebook. Watch this org to hear when it lands.

Contributing

New general skills, platform-constraint updates (char limits change constantly), and voice/format improvements are all welcome — see CONTRIBUTING.md. One hard rule: skills here stay vendor-neutral and deliver their complete promise with only the agent's own abilities.

MIT LICENSE. Built by Inklate.

blocks.html_en: Interview the user in ten questions or fewer and produce a social-context.md file that captures who they are, who they are talking to, what they post about, and what they refuse to post.

sentences.en: Interview the user in ten questions or fewer and produce a social-context.md file that captures who they are, who they are talking to, what they post about, and what they refuse to post.
sentences.zh: 以十个问题或更少的方式采访用户，并生成一个 Social-context.md 文件，该文件捕获他们是谁、他们正在与谁交谈、他们发布的内容以及他们拒绝发布的内容。

blocks.html_en: Analyze 3–10 writing samples the user provides — LinkedIn posts, X (Twitter) threads, emails, blog posts — and distill how they actually write: sentence length, rhythm, vocabulary, punctuation and emoji habits, openers, sign-offs, and humor register.

sentences.zh: 分析用户提供的 3-10 个写作样本——LinkedIn 帖子、X (Twitter) 帖子、电子邮件、博客帖子——并提炼出他们的实际写作方式：句子长度、节奏、词汇、标点符号和表情符号习惯、开场白、结束语和幽默语域。

blocks.html_en: Turn a post, article, or idea into a complete slide-by-slide carousel script for Instagram or LinkedIn, with a hook cover, one-idea-per-slide content slides, a recap, and a CTA slide.

sentences.en: Turn a post, article, or idea into a complete slide-by-slide carousel script for Instagram or LinkedIn, with a hook cover, one-idea-per-slide content slides, a recap, and a CTA slide.
sentences.zh: 将帖子、文章或想法转变为 Instagram 或 LinkedIn 的完整幻灯片轮播脚本，包括挂钩封面、每幻灯片一个想法的内容幻灯片、回顾和 CTA 幻灯片。

blocks.html_en: Turn one story, blog post, announcement, or idea into native-feeling drafts for multiple platforms at once — LinkedIn, X (Twitter), Instagram, Facebook, Threads, Bluesky, and Mastodon — adapting tone, length, structure, hashtags, and format per platform instead of copy-pasting one caption everywhere.

sentences.en: Turn one story, blog post, announcement, or idea into native-feeling drafts for multiple platforms at once — LinkedIn, X (Twitter), Instagram, Facebook, Threads, Bluesky, and Mastodon — adapting tone, length, structure, hashtags, and format per platform instead of copy-pasting one caption everywhere.
sentences.zh: 将一个故事、博客文章、公告或想法同时转换为适用于多个平台（LinkedIn、X (Twitter)、Instagram、Facebook、Threads、Bluesky 和 ​​Mastodon）的原生草稿，并根据每个平台调整语气、长度、结构、主题标签和格式，而不是在各处复制粘贴一个标题。

blocks.html_en: Generate eight scored hook options for any social post draft or topic, spanning proven patterns from curiosity gaps and bold claims to contrarian takes and story cold-opens.

sentences.en: Generate eight scored hook options for any social post draft or topic, spanning proven patterns from curiosity gaps and bold claims to contrarian takes and story cold-opens.
sentences.zh: 为任何社交帖子草稿或主题生成八个得分挂钩选项，涵盖从好奇心差距和大胆主张到逆向观点和故事冷开的经过验证的模式。

blocks.html_en: Draft a LinkedIn post built for how the LinkedIn feed actually works: a hook that earns the "…see more" click in the first 200 characters, white-space rhythm, one idea per post, a specific call to action, and no hashtag soup.

sentences.en: Draft a LinkedIn post built for how the LinkedIn feed actually works: a hook that earns the "…see more" click in the first 200 characters, white-space rhythm, one idea per post, a specific call to action, and no hashtag soup.
sentences.zh: 起草一篇针对 LinkedIn feed 实际运作方式而构建的 LinkedIn 帖子：在前 200 个字符中赢得“……查看更多”点击的挂钩、空白节奏、每个帖子一个想法、特定的号召性用语，并且没有主题标签汤。

blocks.html_en: Triage a pasted batch of comments, mentions, and DMs from LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Facebook, or Threads, and draft on-voice replies where they're warranted.

sentences.en: Triage a pasted batch of comments, mentions, and DMs from LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Facebook, or Threads, and draft on-voice replies where they're warranted.
sentences.zh: 对来自 LinkedIn、X、Instagram、Facebook 或 Threads 的一批粘贴的评论、提及和私信进行分类，并在必要时起草语音回复。

blocks.html_en: Mine one long-form source — a blog post, video transcript, podcast episode, or talk — for its strongest atomic ideas and turn it into a full week of platform-shaped drafts for LinkedIn, X (Twitter), and Instagram, plus a short-video script.

sentences.en: Mine one long-form source — a blog post, video transcript, podcast episode, or talk — for its strongest atomic ideas and turn it into a full week of platform-shaped drafts for LinkedIn, X (Twitter), and Instagram, plus a short-video script.
sentences.zh: 挖掘一个长篇来源——博客文章、视频记录、播客片段或谈话——寻找最强烈的原子想法，并将其转化为 LinkedIn、X (Twitter) 和 Instagram 的整整一周的平台形草稿，以及短视频脚本。

blocks.html_en: Build an X (Twitter) thread with real architecture instead of a chopped-up blog post: a hook tweet that earns the click-through, one idea per tweet, an escalation-and-payoff structure, and a closing CTA tweet — every tweet char-budgeted to 280 with the count shown.

sentences.en: Build an X (Twitter) thread with real architecture instead of a chopped-up blog post: a hook tweet that earns the click-through, one idea per tweet, an escalation-and-payoff structure, and a closing CTA tweet — every tweet char-budgeted to 280 with the count shown.
sentences.zh: 使用真实的架构构建 X (Twitter) 线程，而不是支离破碎的博客文章：一条吸引点击的推文、每条推文一个想法、升级和回报结构以及结束 CTA 推文 - 每条推文的字符预算为 280，并显示计数。

blocks.html_en: Write paid social ad copy variant sets for Meta (Facebook and Instagram), LinkedIn, X, and TikTok placements.

sentences.en: Write paid social ad copy variant sets for Meta (Facebook and Instagram), LinkedIn, X, and TikTok placements.
sentences.zh: 为 Meta（Facebook 和 Instagram）、LinkedIn、X 和 TikTok 展示位置编写付费社交广告文案变体集。

blocks.html_en: Turn content pillars, target platforms, and an honest posting cadence into a realistic 2-week content plan for LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Threads, Bluesky, and Facebook.

sentences.en: Turn content pillars, target platforms, and an honest posting cadence into a realistic 2-week content plan for LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Threads, Bluesky, and Facebook.
sentences.zh: 将内容支柱、目标平台和诚实的发帖节奏转变为 LinkedIn、X、Instagram、Threads、Bluesky 和 ​​Facebook 的现实的两周内容计划。

blocks.html_en: Validate a social post draft against the target platform's real constraints and conventions before it goes out, covering LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, Bluesky, and Mastodon.

sentences.en: Validate a social post draft against the target platform's real constraints and conventions before it goes out, covering LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, Bluesky, and Mastodon.
sentences.zh: 在社交帖子草稿发布之前，根据目标平台的实际限制和惯例进行验证，涵盖 LinkedIn、X、Instagram、Facebook、Threads、Bluesky 和 ​​Mastodon。

blocks.html_en: Audit a social profile or content history the user pastes or points at — LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, or Bluesky — against their stated goals.

sentences.en: Audit a social profile or content history the user pastes or points at — LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, or Bluesky — against their stated goals.

One hard rule: skills here stay vendor-neutral and deliver their complete promise with only the agent's own abilities.

blocks.html_en: MIT LICENSE. Built by Inklate.

content_html_zh:
人工智能代理技能的集合，可学习您的策略、语音和平台本机格式 - 帖子、线程、轮播、卷轴就绪脚本、广告文案、日历。

Your agent can already write. It can't write a LinkedIn post that sounds like you, sized for the feed, with a hook that stops the scroll. These skills teach it strategy, voice, and platform-native format — posts, threads, carousels, reels-ready scripts, ad copy, calendars — a full content system, not one-off prompts. No accounts, no APIs, works in every agent.

快速启动

npx skills add inklate/social-skills
Tip: when an agent runs this non-interactively it may install only to .agents/skills/, which Claude Code doesn't read — pass -a claude-code. Install a single skill with --skill cross-post.

或者作为自动更新的克劳德代码插件：

/plugin marketplace add inklate/social-skills
/plugin install social-skills@inklate

然后说“设置我的社交背景”开始 - 社交背景技能会采访您一次并编写social-context.md，这是所有其他技能为您的受众、平台、支柱和声音读取的文件。

技能

Skill 类别 它的作用
社会背景 基础 以十个问题或更少的方式采访用户，并生成一个 Social-context.md 文件，该文件捕获他们是谁、他们正在与谁交谈、他们发布的内容以及他们拒绝发布的内容。
voice 基础 分析用户提供的 3-10 个写作样本——LinkedIn 帖子、X (Twitter) 帖子、电子邮件、博客帖子——并提炼出他们的实际写作方式：句子长度、节奏、词汇、标点符号和表情符号习惯、开场白、结束语和幽默语域。
旋转木马 创造 将帖子、文章或想法转变为 Instagram 或 LinkedIn 的完整幻灯片轮播脚本，包括挂钩封面、每幻灯片一个想法的内容幻灯片、回顾和 CTA 幻灯片。
交叉帖子 创造 将一个故事、博客文章、公告或想法同时转换为适用于多个平台（LinkedIn、X (Twitter)、Instagram、Facebook、Threads、Bluesky 和 ​​Mastodon）的原生草稿，并根据每个平台调整语气、长度、结构、主题标签和格式，而不是在各处复制粘贴一个标题。
hooks 创造 为任何社交帖子草稿或主题生成八个得分挂钩选项，涵盖从好奇心差距和大胆主张到逆向观点和故事冷开的经过验证的模式。
链接帖子 创造 起草一篇针对 LinkedIn feed 实际运作方式而构建的 LinkedIn 帖子：在前 200 个字符中赢得“……查看更多”点击的挂钩、空白节奏、每个帖子一个想法、特定的号召性用语，并且没有主题标签汤。
回复作者 创造 对来自 LinkedIn、X、Instagram、Facebook 或 Threads 的一批粘贴的评论、提及和私信进行分类，并在必要时起草语音回复。
重新利用 创造 挖掘一个长篇来源——博客文章、视频记录、播客片段或谈话——寻找最强烈的原子想法，并将其转化为 LinkedIn、X (Twitter) 和 Instagram 的整整一周的平台形草稿，以及短视频脚本。
X线 创造 使用真实的架构构建 X (Twitter) 线程，而不是支离破碎的博客文章：一条吸引点击的推文、每条推文一个想法、升级和回报结构以及结束 CTA 推文 - 每条推文的字符预算为 280，并显示计数。
广告撰稿人 Ads 为 Meta（Facebook 和 Instagram）、LinkedIn、X 和 TikTok 展示位置编写付费社交广告文案变体集。
内容日历 Plan 将内容支柱、目标平台和诚实的发帖节奏转变为 LinkedIn、X、Instagram、Threads、Bluesky 和 ​​Facebook 的现实的两周内容计划。
事后检查 Check 在社交帖子草稿发布之前，根据目标平台的实际限制和惯例进行验证，涵盖 LinkedIn、X、Instagram、Facebook、Threads、Bluesky 和 ​​Mastodon。
社会审计 Check 根据用户声明的目标审核用户粘贴或指向的社交个人资料或内容历史记录（LinkedIn、X、Instagram、Facebook、Threads 或 Bluesky）。

技能如何组合在一起

            ┌────────────────┐   ┌───────┐
            │ social-context │ + │ voice │        Foundation — run these first;
            └───────┬────────┘   └───┬───┘        they write social-context.md
                    └───────┬────────┘
        ┌───────────────────┼────────────────────┐
        ▼                   ▼                    ▼
      CREATE               PLAN                CHECK
  linkedin-post      content-calendar        post-check
  x-thread                                   social-audit
  hooks                    ADS
  carousel               ad-writer
  cross-post
  repurpose
  reply-writer

就说吧

技能会在自然短语上触发——无需记住命令：

  • “将此博文转为 LinkedIn 和 X 的帖子”→ 交叉发布
  • “写一篇关于我们的发布的 LinkedIn 帖子” → linkedin-post
  • “给我这个草稿更好的钩子” → 钩子
  • “计划我接下来两周的内容”→ 内容日历
  • “这可以在 Instagram 上使用吗？” → 事后检查
  • “为此优惠编写 Facebook 广告变体” → 广告撰写者
  • “帮我回复这些评论” → 回复作者
  • “从这些帖子中学习我的声音” → 声音

为您的代理安装

These are standard Agent Skills — one folder per skill, each a SKILL.md — so any agent that reads the format can use them. The skills CLI installs them into whichever agent you use (40+ supported); pass -a <agent> to target one explicitly, or omit it to auto-detect the agents you have installed.

Agent 安装 技能文档
克劳德·科德 npx 技能添加 inklate/social-skills -a claude-code — 或插件 docs
法典 CLI npx 技能添加 inklate/social-skills -a codex docs
光标 npx 技能添加 inklate/social-skills -a 光标 docs
开放代码 npx 技能添加 inklate/social-skills -a opencode docs
双子座命令行界面 npx 技能添加 inklate/social-skills -a Gemini docs
GitHub 副驾驶 npx 技能添加 inklate/social-skills -a copilot docs

完整的代理列表位于 Skills.sh 中。

手动安装

  • 复制到位： git clone https://github.com/inklate/social-skills && cp -r Social-skills/skills/* ~/.claude/skills/ （将目标交换为代理的技能目录）。
  • 子模块： git 子模块添加 https://github.com/inklate/social-skills .agents/social-skills
  • Zips：GitHub 上针对 Claude Desktop/Cowork 上传的每个技能的 zips。
  • Fork it. These skills are meant to be customized — fork the repo and edit the voice rules, platform defaults, and quality bars to match your brand.

运送它

These skills produce drafts and plans. Coming next: a companion skill pack that lets your agent actually publish, schedule, and measure across LinkedIn, X, Instagram, and Facebook. Watch this org to hear when it lands.

贡献

New general skills, platform-constraint updates (char limits change constantly), and voice/format improvements are all welcome — see CONTRIBUTING.md. One hard rule: skills here stay vendor-neutral and deliver their complete promise with only the agent's own abilities.

MIT LICENSE. Built by Inklate.
